title: Password Maker
subtitle: Create super strong passwords that keep the bad guys out! 🛡️
tipLongerText: A 16-character password is WAY harder to crack than an 8-character one!
tipMixText: Use letters, numbers, AND symbols for the strongest passwords.
tipReuseText: Use a different password for every account. That way if one gets stolen, the others are safe!
tipSecretText: Never share your passwords with friends. Not even your best friend!
